title: Professional Services Agreement
summary: Print-ready professional services agreement between Northwind Digital Solutions and Clearwater Analytics with both digital and physical signature sections.
provider_address: 88 King Street West, Suite 1400, Toronto, ON M5H 1A1, Canada
services_description: The professional services described in Schedule A and any subsequent Statements of Work
contract_term: Twelve (12) months from the Effective Date with automatic six-month renewals
scope_description: Provider shall design, develop, test, and deploy a cloud-based data integration platform connecting Client's portfolio management system with third-party market data feeds, as described in detail in Schedule A.
payment_terms: Client shall pay Provider monthly installments of $29,000.00 USD, due on the first business day of each month. Late payments shall bear interest at 1.5% per month after a 10-day grace period.
confidentiality_clause: Each party agrees to hold in strict confidence all Confidential Information received from the other party and to use such information only for purposes of performing its obligations under this Agreement. This obligation survives termination for a period of three (3) years.
liability_clause: EXCEPT FOR BREACHES OF CONFIDENTIALITY OR INDEMNIFICATION OBLIGATIONS, NEITHER PARTY'S AGGREGATE LIABILITY UNDER THIS AGREEMENT SHALL EXCEED THE TOTAL FEES PAID IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.
termination_clause: Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon sixty (60) days written notice. Either party may terminate for material breach if such breach remains uncured thirty (30) days after written notice.
